title: Legalese
description:
Remove the anvil character limit!
Free yourself from the surveillance state!
body:
# Legalese
Did you ever want to rename your favourite item to the complete works of Sherlock Holmes but were unjustly stumped by the anvil character limit? No more! I have removed this oppressive symbol of the surveillance state so you can finally name your things however long you like!*


_*Note: Copying the entire works of Sherlock Holmes into your anvil may lead to unforeseen behaviour up to and including game crashes or world corruption. I take no responsibility should you use this mod and discover your world rendered permanently weird†_

_†Update: I have since tried this and can confirm that the client does crash upon pasting the second chapter of A Study in Scarlet. The relevant error is a packet encoding error on the client side. The first chapter of A Study in Scarlet numbers more than 15 000 characters. This should be more than enough to satisfy your naming needs._


![W I D E S K E L E T O N](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ba17cf913bb0fc455465b5666b09fb3262d0725.jpeg)
